division_title: Private Carriers of Passengers Registration Act
text: This division may be cited as the Private Carriers of Passengers Registration Act.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 14.86. Private Carriers of Passengers Registration Act [34680 - 34693]
##### § 34680

This division may be cited as the Private Carriers of Passengers Registration Act.

*(Added by Stats. 2017, Ch. 421, Sec. 40. (SB 19) Effective January 1, 2018. Operative July 1, 2018, pursuant to Section 34693.)*

subsections.text: This division may be cited as the Private Carriers of Passengers Registration Act.
